title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 115.512 - Votes for gubernatorial candidates, how reported
text:
115.512.  Votes for gubernatorial candidates, how reported. — Each election authority shall report the vote for each candidate for governor by committee district for each congressional district, senatorial district, and legislative district wholly or partially contained within the jurisdiction of the election authority to the chairman of the county committee of each established political party and to the secretary of state.
(L. 1982 S.B. 526) 
Effective 5-20-82
